style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Four labelled boxes: BROWSER (top left), IDENTITY PROVIDER · GOOGLE / MICROSOFT (top right), SERVER (centre), and DATABASE · refresh_token (bottom right). Arrows: BROWSER to IDENTITY PROVIDER labelled SSO SIGN-IN and back; SERVER to BROWSER labelled SETS httpOnly COOKIES: ACCESS 15 min, REFRESH 7 days; SERVER to DATABASE labelled STORES SHA-256 HASH; a dashed return arrow labelled 401 TOKEN_EXPIRED then a curved arrow POST /auth/refresh — ROTATE. Small caption NO PASSWORDS STORED. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Four labelled boxes: BROWSER (top left), IDENTITY PROVIDER · GOOGLE / MICROSOFT (top right), SERVER (centre), and DATABASE · refresh_token (bottom right). Arrows: BROWSER to IDENTITY PROVIDER labelled SSO SIGN-IN and back; SERVER to BROWSER labelled SETS httpOnly COOKIES: ACCESS 15 min, REFRESH 7 days; SERVER to DATABASE labelled STORES SHA-256 HASH; a dashed return arrow labelled 401 TOKEN_EXPIRED then a curved arrow POST /auth/refresh — ROTATE. Small caption NO PASSWORDS STORED. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
